name: Spicey Hot Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mug.
2. Heat the milk until it is warm and steamy.
3. Add the sugar, cocoa, instant coffee powder, and ground cinnamon to the mug with the warmed milk.
4. Stir until well blended.
5. Serve immediately. Garnish with a dollop of whipped cream and a cinnamon stick if desired.
